2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch extracts a helper function called ensure_on_mmlist() from the mm module, which ensures that an mm_struct is added to the init_mm.mmlist so that swapoff can find and unuse its swap entries. The double-checked locking pattern was previously open-coded in try_to_unmap_one() and copy_nonpresent_pte(). The helper function will be reused by upcoming PMD-level swap entry code paths. The insertion point of the mm_struct into the mmlist is irrelevant, as only membership matters for swapoff to find it.
